goal: Examine turn-by-turn data from recent interactions to determine whether the theoretical cortisol buildup and anandamide buffering cycle is occurring in practice, and assess how predictor state interacts with emotional valence during that cycle.

plan_steps.description: Fetch recent interaction data from the logs.
acceptance_criteria: Recent interaction data is retrieved successfully.

plan_steps.description: Parse and extract turn-by-turn data from the fetched logs.
acceptance_criteria: Turn-by-turn data is extracted and stored in a structured format.

plan_steps.description: Identify instances of cortisol buildup and anandamide buffering cycles in the turn-by-turn data.
acceptance_criteria: Cortisol buildup and anandamide buffering cycle instances are identified and labeled.

plan_steps.description: Analyze how predictor state interacts with emotional valence during the identified cycles.
acceptance_criteria: Predictor state interactions with emotional valence are analyzed and documented.

spoken_summary: I couldn't examine the interaction data because no analysis steps were executed — there's nothing to report on the cortisol-anandamide cycle or how predictor state ties to emotional valence. Want me to pull the raw interaction logs and start correlating those markers?
